title: MultiChat
body: # MultiChat [![servers][1]][6] [![spigot-downloads][2]][7] [![modrinth-downloads][5]][8] Minecraft Server plugin for world specific chat utilities No other customization will be added, I just use this plugin for myself and thought others might appreciate the chat style. Color of the world depends on the environment. `_nether` and `_the_end` gets cut off of the world name and it gets capitalized. That means that when a player in `world_nether` types a message it will become a red `World` followed by the username and message. Example with `world`, `world_nether` and `world_the_end`: ![example][4] ## Usage - Just write in chat! ## Questions or feedback? - Create an issue [here][11] ## See also - [MultiTime][9] - [MultiWeather][10] [1]: https://img.shields.io/bstats/servers/24063 [2]: https://img.shields.io/spiget/downloads/121111?label=spigot%20downloads&color=%23e2e83f [3]: https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/multiverse-core [4]: https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZoVza4Va/images/3677d7219741750eda7cf40a19caea90a6c2f014.png [5]: https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ZoVza4Va?label=modrinth%20downloads&color=%231bd96a [6]: https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/MultiChat/24063 [7]: https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/multichat.121111/ [8]: https://modrinth.com/plugin/multichat2 [9]: https://modrinth.com/plugin/multitime [10]: https://modrinth.com/plugin/multiweather [11]: https://codeberg.org/MaddinM/MultiPlugins/issues
